messages.content:
<image>
Based on this ROI, what is the histologic grade of the invasive carcinoma?
(A) Grade 1 (well differentiated)
(B) Grade 2 (moderately differentiated)
(C) Grade 3 (poorly differentiated)
(D) Cannot determine

<image>
Does this ROI show evidence of lymphovascular invasion?
(A) Yes
(B) No
(C) Indeterminate
